name: BotNonAdminImpersonationPolicy
description: Policy for bots that are allowed to impersonate users except admins. Admins cannot be restricted via RBAC, so impersonating them would allow privilege escalation. Attach this (or BotNonAdminImpersonationRole) to a bot instead of BotImpersonationPolicy to deny admin impersonation.

rules.name: BotNonAdminImpersonationPolicy-Allow
rules.description: Allow the bot to impersonate users.
